scripts.format: prettier --write package.json README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/TODO.md docs/api-design.md docs/dynamic-layout.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md docs/performance-comparison.md packages/bench/index.mjs packages/bench/dynamic-layout.mjs packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs packages/compiler/src/analyzer.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-template.ts packages/compiler/src/index.ts packages/compiler/src/lowering.ts packages/compiler/src/source-map.ts packages/runtime/src/byte-vectors.ts packages/runtime/src/index.ts packages/runtime/src/scalar-vector.ts packages/runtime/src/vector-base.ts packages/runtime/src/view-base.ts packages/runtime/src/writer.ts packages/runtime/src/writer-arena.ts packages/schema/src/index.ts tests/compiler/analyzer.test.ts tests/compiler/source-map.test.ts tests/public-api.test.ts tests/runtime/dynamic-layout.test.ts tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/TODO.md docs/api-design.md docs/dynamic-layout.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md docs/performance-comparison.md packages/bench/index.mjs packages/bench/dynamic-layout.mjs packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs packages/compiler/src/analyzer.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-template.ts packages/compiler/src/index.ts packages/compiler/src/lowering.ts packages/compiler/src/source-map.ts packages/runtime/src/byte-vectors.ts packages/runtime/src/index.ts packages/runtime/src/scalar-vector.ts packages/runtime/src/vector-base.ts packages/runtime/src/view-base.ts packages/runtime/src/writer.ts packages/runtime/src/writer-arena.ts packages/schema/src/index.ts tests/compiler/analyzer.test.ts tests/compiler/source-map.test.ts tests/public-api.test.ts tests/runtime/dynamic-layout.test.ts tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run package:policy && npm run clean && npm run build && npm test && npm run codegen:basic
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-types && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-schema && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-runtime && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-compiler
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run pack:check && npm run consumer:smoke
scripts.bench: npm run codegen:basic && npm run build && node --expose-gc ./packages/bench/index.mjs
scripts.bench:cursor-diagnostics: npm run codegen:basic && npm run codegen:diagnostic:cursor-offsets && npm run build && node --expose-gc ./packages/bench/index.mjs --cursor-diagnostics
